certificate.description: The RiSM-1SPF is an in-line network encryption device capable of very high bandwidth over gigabit Ethernet and utilizes very low POE power. The Module is used to secure layer 2 Ethernet communications over the Rajant’s Kinetic Mesh® wireless mesh networks. The Module is ruggedized and may be used in extreme environments to secure traffic between endpoints, subnets or a combination.
